sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80747" key="pentafu/lakos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντα-φύλᾰκος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80747.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divided into five watches</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">νύξ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:55" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stesich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">πεντε</itype>- codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
